General.Name: G-Vision International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: G-Vision International (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, operates Chinese restaurants in Hong Kong. The company's restaurants specialize in Chiu Chow cuisine. It also provides property development and management services. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. G-Vision International (Holdings) Limited is a subsidiary of Kong Fai International Limited.
General.Address: Unit 108, East Ocean Centre, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
